BaseApi/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version property from 1.8 to 11 to align with the JDK 11 migration.
BaseApi/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 8 semantics, failing to utilize or enforce Java 11 features and potentially causing compatibility issues with libraries requiring Java 11.

BaseApi/src/main/java/com/base/common/ut.general_idea: Replace deprecated BigDecimal.ROUND_HALF_UP constant with RoundingMode.HALF_UP enum value.
BaseApi/src/main/java/com/base/common/ut.why_exists: BigDecimal.ROUND_HALF_UP was removed in Java 9, causing a compilation error on Java 11.

BaseApi/src/main/java/com/base/common/ut.general_idea: Add import for java.math.RoundingMode to support the new rounding mode usage.
BaseApi/src/main/java/com/base/common/ut.why_exists: RoundingMode class is not imported, causing a compilation error (cannot find symbol) on Java 11.

BaseApi/src/main/java/com/base/datasourc.general_idea: Add JDBC 4.3 Wrapper interface methods to DynamicDataSource to satisfy compilation requirements in Java 11.
BaseApi/src/main/java/com/base/datasourc.why_exists: In Java 11, AbstractRoutingDataSource implements the Wrapper interface from JDBC 4.3, which requires concrete implementations of isWrapperFor, unwrap, and getParentLogger. Without these methods, the class fails to compile due to missing abstract method implementations.
BaseApi/src/main/java/com/base/datasourc.after: public boolean isWrapperFor(Class<?> iface) throws java.sql.SQLException { ... } public <T> T unwrap(Class<T> iface) throws java.sql.SQLException { ... } public java.util.logging.Logger getParentLogger() { ... }
